name: agi-orchestrator
description: Local autopilot orchestrator: drives interactive Claude Code sessions via owned PTYs, using a local LLM (Qwen) as the human-surrogate decision-maker. Subscription-safe, no Agent SDK, no API key.

scripts.test: tsx scripts/context-test.ts && tsx scripts/learn-test.ts && tsx scripts/repostate-test.ts && tsx scripts/multimodel-test.ts && tsx scripts/summary-test.ts && tsx scripts/workflow-test.ts && tsx scripts/template-test.ts && tsx scripts/notify-test.ts && tsx scripts/intake-test.ts && tsx scripts/schedule-test.ts && tsx scripts/gitdiff-test.ts && tsx scripts/discovery-test.ts && tsx scripts/desktop-test.ts && tsx scripts/dispatch-test.ts && tsx scripts/screen-classify-test.ts && tsx scripts/choice-test.ts && tsx scripts/ratelimit-test.ts && tsx scripts/usage-test.ts && tsx scripts/live-edit-test.ts
scripts.smoke: tsx scripts/spinloop-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/agent-turn-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/usage-smoke.ts
